home.meta_title: FuelEcon — Petrol Cost Calculator UK | Plain-English Fuel Economy Tool
home.meta_description: Work out the real cost of any drive in plain English. FuelEcon shows your fuel use, journey cost, and the easy tweaks that save petrol — no mpg degree required.
home.vehicle_card_blurb: Don't know your MPG? Pick your car from the dropdowns — we'll fill it in.
home.ev_notice_html: ⚡ Driving an EV? Petrol calc doesn't apply — use our EV cost tool.
home.trip_card_blurb: Slide to set the distance, pick your route, and we'll show what the journey actually costs.

footer.blurb: Plain-English tools for working out what driving actually costs. Built by drivers, for drivers.
